title: Fantastic site 😎 so glad I found it 😀 9/10
text:
Fantastic site 😎 

Plenty to choose from,next day delivery,bundle deals mix and match 😎  the slide guide to show how to pay using cryptocurrency was a really big help amd if you overpay you'll get a voucher code to get the difference taken off on your next order .
I've tried the UK buds and was really happy with it but they were under weight 3.4g then take away the stems amd weighed 3.17, I had 6 flavours all under weight amd all together comes to 2g short!?..... next on the list is the exotic grows which come from America so not sure if it's worth it but gonna give it a go see if the extra money is worth it, customer service is top notch, Rory is very helpful and will help you with any queries that you may have.would be 10 stars but the under weight thing isn't good, just hope the exotics are worth the money

title: Top notch customer service
text:
Product wasn’t as good as describe buying gummies it was lower dosage than listed and did nothing even for new smokers. I had ordered the bundle so 2 packets but they weren't great

Update after speaking with customer support I was awarded a voucher to make up for my troubles. So I will be trying again and updating this post

companyReply.text:
Hi Sui 😎

Im so sorry to hear that the gummy bears were not potent enough 😕 it looks like you may have received a badly mixed batch, this happens very rarely 😅 

If you email us or contact us on WhatsApp we would be more than happy to change your negative experience into a positive one 💚 we look forward to making this right 🫡

title: Original, Quirky, Efficient, High-Quality
text: Thoroughly impressed on all levels. There's a deep sense of originality about this site - slightly quirky, slightly off-the-wall but, at the same time, highly efficient, good value for money (no big overhead on next-day delivery, for example) & gear (pre-rolls in my case) that's beautifully packaged & of very high quality. After the recent (somewhat rapid) demise of BlazeRunner, this site was a ray of light. Kudos. Note, only BCH is accepted at the moment (not a criticism, just a comment). Will be using again soon.

title: Didn’t expect this to go so smoothly.
text:
Never thought I’d go out of my way to make an account for a trustpilot review but here we are.  
Honestly like many of you, was a bit skeptical before placing my first order, but im sure as hell glad i took that ‘leap of faith’ (as many call it). Next day delivery without any hassle and paying using bitcoin cash was very straightforward after the intial set up (in which they helpfully guide you through step-by-step). 

If not from me, take it from the other 400+ reviews; these guys know what they’re doing. (P.S. writing this blazed asf from their edibles😹 )

title: Highly recommended
text:
Have ordered twice from One Shop. I tend to order edibles and they have been great each time. I ordered a couple of pre rolls with my most recent order and they were a bit strong for me (I haven't smoked for a long time) but for people who regularly smoke I'm pretty sure they're excellent quality.

Delivery has been next day both times I've ordered. I've had no issues with ordering/paying and used the Moonpay tutorials on the website having no previous experience of paying with crypto before and found the tutorials to be pretty fool proof. 

Great products and I've had prompt responses to any questions I've had via the WhatsApp function. Highly recommended.

title: Excellent quality 👌
text: High quality, decent pricing and good delivery. What else do you need? 😁👌

title: 5 star experience
text: 5 star experience, communication was great throughout the ordering process and my queries were answered quickly being a first time customer, arrived on time and the products purchased are top quality, have just placed my second order, definitely recommend.

title: Great product
text: Great product, reliable + potent, easy to use and arrived fast, no complaints 👍

title: Good impressions and 1st time experience.
text:
After we done some research and a mate had an order arrived. i ordered 4 strains thursday night and it came saturday morning,  Each was fresh, cured, clean and busting with terps which has been a rare sight for me for a long time. Apple tarts stood out the most for me for being the most tasty n strong, respect to the gardener. 

The guy in whatsapp seems friendly and helpful also. From mine and my fiances 1st experience, my mates feedback from a couple of orders (hes jus as fussy as me) and reading other reviews, these guys seem pretty consistent, they seem to actualy care about what theyre shifting and not jus trying to make a quick few quid, even all complaints i can see a response from One Shop attenpting to make it right which is nice to see.
If like me, youre sick of the crap harsh mouldy stardawg that has plagued the uk or the so called calis, and u care about your health, give it a try!
I will say the payment method is a lil work at first, but they have guides to make it easier.
Will order and review again.

title: Ordered big mama edibles for affordable…
text:
Ordered big mama edibles for affordable price and the shii is bang 💥 
BANG BANG 🔥 
Never had an edible hit me like a freight train I want to get hit over and over again lol (literally typing this while I’m highhh) 
Rory is amazing guy, brilliant customer service and he’s got great sense of humour man I wish he’d be my friend, you know that kind of friend one would want to invite for a good smoking session or a drink and keep talking for hours…
Anyway, absolutely satisfied with the delivery timing as well, arriving within a day. Would definitely buy again 😎

title: 100% Legit
text:
I order from these guys often and have never been let down, always top quality buds and always receive it the next day in very discreet packaging.

I did put in an order on a Friday where they received payment in time but the order didn't confirm until after the cut off, thought I'd have to wait until Tuesday but they shipped it on the Saturday and I received it on Sunday! I'm not even going to try anywhere else because the service here is so good!

Any issues and you can contact them on WhatsApp, they replied to me almost straight away.

title: Fantastic!
text:
Fantastic product and customer service! An absolutely night and day difference from other suppliers (or pushy peddlers in person), I've ordered from. 

I was - like most first time customers - a little hesitant, but I have no such reservations now. 

Love the flavours of the gummy bears and the humour on the packaging. Top tier branding from the site to what you get.

title: PERFECT
text: I was struggling with payment at first the WhatsApp and instagram team were very helpful got a email when shipped and it was so fast I placed my order at like 4am 🤣 on the 26th it came about 2 today 27th got a cocktail and a pre roll absolutely TOP best stuff I’ve had in a good while it tastes exactly how it says it does on the site and I’m a daily smoker would absolutely recommend  will defo be returning 🫡

title: Not fit for human consumption....

I have emailed but still waiting for response.....

title: New Plug
text:
Favourite so far is divine jelly, the flavour is just amazing. Hope it comes back when it goes out of stock. RS11 is pretty good too.  
Like some other reviews have said, was hesitant, seemed too good to be true. First order was 3.5g of super boof, after that arrived I immediately ordered 14g. 
My next order will be my third, the previous two have arrived next day.  Payment is relatively easy, the tutorial on paying by BCH is incredibly helpful. 
Honestly, I have no complaints, cost is more than fair, quality is bang on, comes vacuum sealed and ive not needed to contact anyone to comment on the customer service but these guys are incredible, I wont be spending money anywhere else.

title: Absolutely Top-Tier
text:
Absolutely Top-Tier

I’ve tried other stores — yes, I’m naming them: My Edibles, An Doobie, vapes, etc. — and I can confidently say these guys blow them out of the water.

The prices are way cheaper, the quality is higher, and most importantly… this stuff actually works. No disappointment, no guessing, no wasted money.

Now let’s talk customer service — because WOW. I’m honestly desperate half the time and probably annoy them more than I should 😅, but they’re always on it. Super fast responses, insanely professional, but still quirky and human in a way that instantly puts my mind at ease. You can tell they actually care.

From the products to the support, this company just gets it. I won’t be going anywhere else. Much love I really hope they’ve thought of their backup plan to continue this legacy!! I brought the shake mic two packets before and made the most insane edibles out them!! The smoke is so nice. ❤️vapes are also top quality really smooth!!! Not just saying this I’ve ordered another 4 items of the bud and I’m so pleased it’s on its way fast for tomorrow hehehehehehhe!!!!

title: First time ordering
text: First time ordering, and it didn’t really go smoothly… I had trouble paying by Apple Pay, so ended up using Moonpay (already had an account, so no biggie). Order was processed, and shipped quickly, but Royal Mail really took the p*** 🤦🏼‍♀️  I reached out via what’s app, and they gave me my tracking number, which I used to track Royal Mail. I ordered on 8/01/26, and only received my order today (12/01/26) so it wasn’t 24hr tracked, turned out to be 96hrs!!! Royal Mail are an absolute joke, but this company is 100% legit, and shake that I ordered is 10/10.

My first time ever using crypto and the guides on the site are good, would only add that u are better getting a crypto wallet to use with the Moonpay option. Again, I was concerned doing this online but really glad I did, such a better option to get in in the post without all the stress, worry of traditional methods. Got an email and confirmation on dispatch and was surprised at how professional the service was

title: My Experience
text:
Since being referred to One Shop, I now purchase my bud here weekly. I tend to go for the UK grow, decent selection of flavours and the price is fair. Bud is nice a clean, good size nugs and well packaged.

I’ve had about 14/15 orders so far, apart from being late once or twice (Postman's fault), they arrived within 24hrs. Always buzzing to get that email confirming delivery 🥳

Customer service is spot on, very helpful and reassuring. Shout out Rory!! 🫶🏻

Overall, my experience with One Shop has been nothing but positive. I would highly recommend giving these guys a try!! Got another pack on the way already 😁

title: Good product, good company

title: Great service and first rate product.
text: Superb service and guidance with crypto issues. Excellent!
Excellent! As Ever! One Shop is a highly reliable dispensary - they have NEVER let me down, the stock is updated with frequent regularity and is always of excellent quantity! Thank you One Shop!

If you’ve come here looking for reassurance before placing an order like I did, please be reassured.
If you also contacted the good people of One Shop by WhatsApp for more reassurance with requests for recommendations and questions about delivery, please be reassured.
To operate successfully given the current categorisation of the product while offering quality of product and sincere service of the highest standards is beyond impressive.
I have found the answer to my prayers.
Fill your boots and be happy.
Peace out.
Free Palestine.

title: Hiccups
text: Amended: Royal Fail issues. Nothing wrong from One Shop's end.

companyReply.text:
Hi J 😕

I completely understand your frustration. Royal mail are taking the absolute p1ss this week. The best advice i can give is that you contact is on WhatsApp and provide us with the postcode on your order. We will contact royal mail ourselves and give them a right bolocking to find out where your order is 👊🏼 also we do have policy that protects customers from orders going missing. Drop us a message on WhatsApp and will do our best to assist 😎

title: Doesn’t work
text: Yeah what ever what do I know!! I’ll delete this after I’ve contacted you and had some luck

companyReply.text:
Please clarify what the issue is, and how have you come to the conclusion that this is a scam if you haven’t ordered anything 🤨 

I have also just noticed that you have slightly exaggerated your claims 😬 we don't get you to signup to multiple third party companies. It’s just the 1 payment company. We also don't make you visit multiple websites its just oneshops.co I understand you may be p1ssed off but please don't take this as an opportunity to stretch the truth, thats not nice. 

If you are referring to the applepay problem that is being caused because the third party company has been banned in the UK. If you had contacted us before dropping this review we would have explained this to you and we would have given you the solution. 

Also as per trustpilots terms and conditions, this review should be placed on the third party companies profile and not ours 😅 we didn’t block the payments, they did. 

I understand your frustration and the headache that this has caused you but sometimes all it takes is a conversation with the right people to solve your problems 👊🏼 we look forward to hearing from you so you can be guided on what to do 😎 

Also i want to point out one more thing… you said that we are ‘getting peeps hopes up’ well if you go through our Trustpilot reviews you will see that your are literally the only person with this issue 😵‍💫 the reason why no one else has this issue is because theyve contacted us and we've advised them on what to do. Its this special tactic that I personally learnt when i worked for the navy seals in disneyland, its called communication.

title: I'd give them more stars if I could.

I have an idea of most strains but will ask support what they suggest, I'd usually list out what I do enjoy and don't, I wasn't a buttery fan but months of Rory telling me otherwise Ive converted to cake strains.

They're like your mates from your ends, always a pleasure chatting to them, very helpful, very Nice!!

Im told they have something in store for us, coming soon! Its my cake day tomorrow and will be celebrating with One Shop.

title: Legit Reliable and Absolutely Amazing
text:
I recently ordered from One Shop and I can confirm this is 100% legit. You can buy from them online and the whole experience was fantastic even with a small hiccup on my end.

Their system doesn’t support credit card payments in the UK anymore so I had to use Moonpay which was a bit confusing. I made a mistake during the process but reached out to their customer service on WhatsApp and was honestly amazed. They responded super quickly and were incredibly helpful and friendly. I don’t get this kind of customer service anywhere anymore. These guys are just fabulous people to deal with. So kind and patient, Customer service like this is rare and they absolutely nailed it.

They even realized they forgot to include something with my order and sent it out immediately the very next day without me even having to ask. I couldn’t be happier. Their customer service is absolutely spot on and the shipping is lightning fast.

My order arrived the next day and the quality is absolutely amazing. No complaints at all. From the way they handle questions to how fast they deliver and the quality of the product everything is flawless.

I’m originally from Canada where cannabis is legal and easy to get and since moving to the UK it’s been a struggle to find anything trustworthy. Finding One Shop has been a total game changer.

Fabulous service fabulous product fabulous people. I’m beyond happy I found them. 100% recommend

title: Amazing website
text:
Amazing website. So easy to use and order, this will be my go to site now rather than a onion/tor site. 
The shake could have been better but it wasn't bad for the price.
Really impressed with the vape too. Yet to try the gummies, I've put them in the freezer though as they were very melty and sticky (i guess it's been super hot recently). Delivery was also next day which was great.
Nice one One Shop!

title: 10/10, would recommend
text: Ordering anything like this can be an intimidating process but got to give a huge shout out to Rory from Customer Service as he made the process super easy and has been one of the most helpful customer service representatives I've ever spoken to. Really high quality service and would thoroughly recommend.

title: A good experience
text:
Bit sceptical of ordering at first but after reading some reviews on here did, and glad I did now! Ordered on the Friday, arrived on the Sunday. First time using Bitcoin but a pretty smooth process and didn't cost much at all in fees, transaction took around 30 mins but presume that will be quicker in future. Had some space runtz hash and a couple bags of shake. If you're after a decent budget smoke I'd recommend it, went with the sour monkey and lemon cherry gelato and they both do the job and taste decent. 

They are also best on price by some margin. Will definitely use again, thx One Shop!

title: Not a scam but be patient with payment
text: If you've got to this point you're probably wondering if you've finally done it? It can't be? You've found a legit site to buy your shiz!! Not just cbd but real thc! Well you have. And it's good product. Arrived promptly, no obvious markings or smell so your postman knows what you're up to. I was so skeptical especially starting to go through the payment process which I have to be honest is a PROCESS it is not as easy as it may seem at first, and you'll probably have to download moonpay if you're in the uk. Also the whatsapp help guy isn't very helpful, but if u persist you will get there and I believe it will now be easier making purchases going forward. The main thing I needed to know from these reviews was is this a scam? These guys are not scammers and I am very happy with my purchase.

title: Excellent as always ,and really fast…
text: Excellent as always ,and really fast delivery, thank you.

title: I am so pleasantly surprised
text:
I am so pleasantly surprised. Obviously, the set up does raise an eyebrow. Weed over the internet on the clear web? At £70 for an Oz of shake tho I couldn't say no. 

I contacted customer service about my delivery, and they were professional and very nice. As someone who has worked in customer service, I ALWAYS appreciate friendly service. 

Delivery super quick and efficient. 

I ordered two sativas, Lemon Haze (I think, I'm currently smoking a spliff and can't check) and Clementine. 

Very lovely high. Smooth smoke. Grinds down SO well. Barely need any for a food smoke. 

This is on me, I should have definitely got a hybrid. I do enjoy a body high as well. If I could have some advice on something with a VERY strong kick, I would love that. 

At these prices and quality, I will definitely be ordering again. It may just be shake, however it does definitely work and do the job. Brilliant, thank you.
